title: webhook — retention windows
description: WebhookDelivery retention is entitlement-driven (config default 30d; plans buy more). WebhookSubscription is retained forever while active. Rotation-grace secrets are cleared after grace expires.
compliance_regimes_referenced: soc2 CC7.3 (system operations — audit trail preservation)
pci-dss Req 10.7 (log retention 1 year for cardholder-adjacent audit)

hot.description: Indexed for admin listings + retry queries.

cold.description: No cold tier — delivery rows are large + expensive. Pruned hard at hot expiry.

purge.action: hard delete in chunks of prune_chunk_size (default 1000). Emit anonymised metric row.

hot.description: Kept forever while the tenant might re-enable.

cold.description: Soft-deleted subscriptions retained 90d in case of accidental delete + admin recovery.

purge.action: hard delete + cascade to remaining deliveries (which are likely already pruned)
clear secret_previous + secret_previous_expires_at columns via UPDATE

retention.compliance_note: Reducing rotation grace attack surface. Prevents stale secrets from lingering in the DB.

cold.description: 7-year cold retention for SOC 2 CC8.1 change management + subscription-lifecycle evidence.
